hooks.statusMessage: EnterWorktree: building guest wasms (full cold compile)...
hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; INPUT=$(cat); WT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_response.path // .tool_response.cwd // empty"); if [ -z "$WT" ]; then PATH_IN=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.path // empty"); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.name // empty"); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".cwd // empty"); if [ -n "$PATH_IN" ]; then WT="$PATH_IN"; elif [ -n "$CWD" ]; then WT="$CWD"; elif [ -n "$NAME" ]; then WT="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; fi; fi; if [ -z "$WT" ] || [ ! -d "$WT" ]; then echo "EnterWorktree hook: could not locate worktree" >&2; exit 1; fi; cd "$WT" && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown 1>&2 && cargo xtask build-guests 1>&2'
